svg.title: Dungeon Crawler RPG — Developer Logic Flow Diagram
svg.desc: Comprehensive flow diagram showing the architecture and runtime logic of the pygame dungeon crawler, from entry point through game states, game loop, entity systems, and data layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Game class in rpg.py and how it initializes')
g.text: Entry point, pygame init, main loop

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the MAIN_MENU game state and how it transitions to other states')
sendPrompt('How does DUNGEON_SELECT work and what does it show the player?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the CHARACTER_CUSTOMIZE state?')
sendPrompt('How does the SHOP state work?')
sendPrompt('What does the ROOM_TEST_SELECT state do for developers?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the PLAYING state and what runs each frame')
sendPrompt('How does the pause system work?')
sendPrompt('What is the RUNE_ALTAR_PICK state?')
sendPrompt('How does the LEVEL_COMPLETE screen work?')
sendPrompt('What are the GAME_OVER and GAME_WIN states?')
sendPrompt('How does player input handling work in _handle_playing?')
sendPrompt('What all happens during player update each frame?')
sendPrompt('How do enemies update each frame and what AI do they use?')
sendPrompt('How does collision detection and resolution work?')
sendPrompt('What status effects exist and how do they tick?')
sendPrompt('How do room objectives work and how are they checked each frame?')
sendPrompt('How does the camera and rendering work?')
sendPrompt('How does the frame rate and clock tick work?')
sendPrompt('Give me an overview of the Player class structure')
sendPrompt('What does movement_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What does attack_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What does combat_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What does dodge_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What does ability_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What does consumable_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What does tool_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What does time_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Enemy base class and its telegraphed attack state machine')
sendPrompt('How does ChaserEnemy AI work?')
sendPrompt('How does PatrolEnemy AI work?')
sendPrompt('How does PulsatorEnemy work?')
sendPrompt('How does LauncherEnemy work?')
sendPrompt('How does SentryEnemy work?')
sendPrompt('How does Dungeon generation work overall?')
sendPrompt('How does dungeon_topology.py plan the room layout?')
sendPrompt('How does dungeon_config.py define dungeons?')
sendPrompt('How does room_selector.py choose rooms?')
sendPrompt('How does Room work — tiles, terrain, doors, enemies?')
sendPrompt('How does room_plan.py define room templates?')
sendPrompt('What terrain types exist and how do they affect gameplay?')
sendPrompt('How does the rune system work end-to-end?')
sendPrompt('What does rune_catalog.py define?')
sendPrompt('What does rune_rules.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What are behavior runes?')
sendPrompt('What are stat runes?')
sendPrompt('How does the item system work — catalog, drops, inventory?')
sendPrompt('How is item_catalog.py structured?')
sendPrompt('What does items.py manage?')
sendPrompt('How does loadout_rules.py work?')
sendPrompt('How does the chest system work?')
sendPrompt('How does the shop system work?')
sendPrompt('What objective entity types exist in objective_entities.py?')
sendPrompt('How do RuneAltar and AltarAnchor work?')
sendPrompt('How does the EscortNPC objective work?')
sendPrompt('What are the trap entities like TrapCrusher and TrapSweeper?')
sendPrompt('What are the ally entities in allies.py?')
sendPrompt('How does the save system work?')
sendPrompt('What does PlayerProgress track?')
sendPrompt('How does content_db.py work with the room database?')
sendPrompt('What does damage_feedback.py do?')
sendPrompt('What does settings.py configure?')
sendPrompt('How does the Camera rendering system work?')
sendPrompt('What does hud.py and hud_view.py render?')
sendPrompt('What does menu.py and menu_view.py contain?')
sendPrompt('What does sprites.py provide?')
sendPrompt('What does weapons.py implement?')
sendPrompt('What does player_visual_rules.py do?')
sendPrompt('How does the room test catalog work for developers?')
sendPrompt('How is pytest used in this project?')
sendPrompt('What is the room_depth_and_generation_plan.md document about?')
sendPrompt('What is in ideas.txt and dungeon ideas.docx?')
